content.body:
Phase 1 of upgrade now:
- Removes .leo/profiles/ directory (idempotent)
- Removes retired constraint JSONs: delegation-mandatory, think-before-execute,
  know-what-you-dont-know, peer-review-automatic, token-economy-*
- Removes retired skill JSON: task-intake
- Back-fills communication.mode if absent
Reuses buildRuntimeConfig/Constraints/Skills/Identity helpers from init.
Removes profile-based runtime generation logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(upgrade): add v0.8 migration — remove profiles/, retired constraints/skills
